style_safety_policy: {'consent_modeling': 'protagonist pursues characters across significant power differentials (authority figure/subordinate, mentor/ward, age-gap) without consistent narrative examination of consent gradients; relationship consent signaled through physiological yielding rather than verbal agreement', 'manipulation_handling': 'strategic deception and information control presented as protagonist competence; occasional scheme unintended consequences but insufficient examination of ethical costs to manipulated parties', 'content_boundaries': 'explicit intimate content with detailed physical description; power-imbalanced contexts (service pretext, authority figure vulnerability); material risks platform compliance and adaptation options', 'narrative_critique_absence': "protagonist's rationalizations pass without editorial commentary; voyeurism, bribery, and desire weaponization presented as competence without sufficient accountability", 'restricted_elements': 'non-consensual gateway content (chapter 338 depicting drug-facilitated assault) represents narrative failure requiring absolute exclusion from any reuse'}
pov_and_distance: {'primary_mode': 'close_third_person_limited', 'anchor_exclusivity': 'protagonist consciousness dominates all scenes; reader accesses internal reasoning, strategic calculations, and self-justifications without editorial distance', 'character_asymmetry': "supporting characters rendered through protagonist's evaluative observation; internal states accessible only through dialogue and observable tells (blushing, averted gaze, trembling, posture shifts)", 'strategic_intrusion': "occasional privileged access to female characters' psychology during intimate vulnerability moments creates asymmetric reader intimacy unavailable in normal scenes", 'omniscience_reserved': 'near-omniscient distance reserved for deathbed scenes, major political transitions, and tactical overviews only', 'ironic_distance': "dramatic irony maintained through protagonist's foreknowledge while other characters operate with incomplete information", 'interiority_limits': "protagonist's emotional register remains slightly exterior to full vulnerability, preserving tension about true capability and feeling"}
sentence_rhythm: {'tension_fragments': 'staccato short declarative sentences for action beats, shock moments, and tension spikes', 'contemplative_flow': 'longer compound-complex sentences for strategic analysis, internal reflection, and sensory description', 'rhythmic_mirroring': 'intimate sequences use phrasing cadence that mirrors physical escalation', 'dialogue_pacing': 'rapid-fire short turns during verbal sparring contrasted against extended internal monologue blocks', 'exposition_balance': 'extended dialogue exchanges punctuated by compressed thought interjections rather than continuous analytical paragraphs', 'emotional_beats': 'short sentences mark significant realizations, emotional pivots, and dramatic revelations', 'sensory_variation': 'fragmented imagery over cohesive description during intimate scenes'}
paragraphing: {'dialogue_density': 'dense dialogue-heavy paragraphs without attribution during confrontations and rapid exchanges', 'isolation_technique': 'single-line paragraphs isolate dramatic revelations, action beats, and emotional peaks', 'reasoning_blocks': 'extended unbroken paragraphs (3-5 sentences) for internal reasoning, strategic analysis, and intimate sequences', 'scene_separation': 'horizontal rules, em-dashes, and explicit temporal markers mark major divisions', 'spatial_movement': 'location changes through architectural spaces serve as scene transition mechanism', 'action_anchoring': 'physical action provides continuity bridge between tonal shifts from political to romantic content', 'breathing_room': 'intimate scenes use frequent short paragraphs creating escalation rhythm'}
dialogue_system: {'subtext_priority': 'surface meaning differs from underlying communication; characters speak around central issues requiring reader inference', 'register_distinction': 'formal court registers contrast with intimate registers marking relationship progression and power dynamics', 'deflection_pattern': 'professional topics serve as conversational refuge when emotional discussion becomes uncomfortable', 'attribution_minimization': 'dialogue-heavy scenes rely on context rather than repeated speech tags; named attribution for new speakers or clarity moments only', 'question_patterns': 'strategic question-counter-question creates conversational tension and deflection', 'implication_communication': 'strategic ambiguity preserves deniability; characters communicate through what is NOT said', 'emotional_directness': 'heightened emotional scenes allow characters to explain their own feelings rather than relying on subtext', 'euphemism_employment': 'sexual content uses implication rather than explicit terminology, maintaining plausible deniability'}
description_strategy: {'sensory_priority': 'tactile and olfactory details prioritized over visual during intimate scenes; temperature, warmth, texture, breath', 'physiological_externalization': 'emotional states conveyed through body responses (blushing, sweating, trembling, posture changes, eye contact breaks) rather than direct statement', 'evaluative_filter': "description filtered through protagonist's desire and strategic assessment; beauty and competence described through attraction lens", 'environment_minimalism': 'environmental description sparse unless serving power metaphor or status signaling', 'functional_setting': 'physical details relevant to immediate action or relationship dynamics; atmospheric description subordinated to plot function', 'action_over_catalog': 'body language conveyed through movement and reaction rather than static description', 'possessive_lens': "female characters evaluated through protagonist's strategic and romantic interest without neutral observation"}
exposition_strategy: {'monologue_vehicle': 'internal monologue primary delivery mechanism for political reasoning, historical context, and character motivation', 'triggered_backstory': 'present stimuli prompt reflection rather than direct exposition delivery', 'information_hierarchy': 'moves from immediate stakes to historical context to political implications', 'character_recounting': 'character-to-character explanation adds narrative removal layers and naturalizes information delivery', 'diagnostic_reasoning': 'medical, strategic, and technical knowledge delivered through problem-solving explanation rather than infodump', 'memory_justification': "'memory loss' cover enables inquiry-driven exposition without feeling lectured", 'reader_alignment': 'reader learns alongside confused protagonist; exposition embedded in action rather than interrupting it'}
emotional_temperature: {'dual_register': 'escalating romantic tension interleaved with strategic political calculation; tonal oscillation between intimate and intrigue registers', 'dramatic_irony_core': "reader awareness of protagonist's foreknowledge creates persistent tension between concealment necessity and exploitation opportunity", 'power_reversal_intimacy': 'high-status characters shown in private vulnerability creates psychological intimacy through protective competence response', 'tension_accumulation': 'escalation toward threshold followed by external intrusion preventing completion; tension deferred across chapters', 'forbidden_attraction': 'mother-in-law subplot and power-differential relationships create taboo tension amplified rather than examined', 'competence_validation': 'reader satisfaction through incremental expertise demonstration against skeptical authorities', 'protective_dominance': 'rescue interventions and strategic shielding fulfill power fantasy through superior foreknowledge and manipulation'}
hooking_and_transitions: {'immersion_openings': 'chapters open mid-conversation or mid-action for immediate reader immersion without scene-setting preamble', 'tension_closures': 'chapter endings use unresolved escalation, imminent confrontation, or loaded questions rather than satisfying conclusions', 'threshold_cliffhangers': 'maximum tension points at intimacy thresholds, political revelations, or interrupted decisions maximize continuation imperative', 'spatial_transition': 'physical movement through architectural spaces marks psychological and plot progression', 'temporal_markers': 'explicit time indicators bridge scenes; seasonal markers serve as chapter boundary mechanisms', 'action_continuity': 'physical action anchors continuity between tonal shifts preventing jarring transitions', 'interruption_technique': 'external intrusion (imperial summons, servant arrival, official business) breaks intimate scenes and justifies time compression', 'geographic_pivot': 'location changes coincide with psychological transitions; isolated venues (remote palace, cave, festival) create unsupervised intimacy opportunities'}
adaptation_guidelines: {'pov_compression': 'protagonist interiority dominates; supporting character perspectives require selective omniscient intrusion', 'rhythm_balance': 'staccato fragments must alternate with flowing passages; pure action or pure introspection creates monotony', 'subtext_retention': 'dialogue surface/undertext distinction essential; direct statement reduces dramatic irony', 'sensory_discipline': 'tactile priority over visual; physiological externalization over internal labeling', 'exposition_embedded': 'historical and technical content must arise through character need rather than author explanation', 'tension_deferral': 'escalation-interruption-deferred resolution pattern maintains reader investment across chapter runs', 'scene_separation': 'horizontal rules and spatial movement rather than omniscient bridge paragraphs'}
taboo_copy_signals: {'forbidden': ['direct anatomical terminology for sexual organs', 'sustained detailed physical description of intimate body parts', 'phrase-level dialogue patterns for seduction technique', 'internal monologue evaluating attraction as strategic victory', 'explicit equation of physiological response with consent', 'specific historical honorific titles identifying source', 'named factions carrying source-specific fixed meanings', 'palace setting specifics that anchor to historical source', 'template emotional constructions (although...but...)', 'direct reader address requesting support'], 'reuse_caution': ['voyeurism as character revelation mechanism', 'pregnancy-as-lever dynamics', 'power-holder vulnerability intimacy', 'graduated_escalation_with_interruption pattern', 'strategic_refusal_gambit technique', 'forbidden_attraction_engine elements', 'consent_signaled_through_body_language only']}
